characters.name: Adult Su
characters.description: Adult Suis a formKaolla Suturns into whenever there is aRed Moon. While in this form, Kaolla tends to play aSetarwhich, in the anime, she can use to access powers like creating copies ofTama-Chanto make a "Lovely Tama Attack". Unlike her sister,Amalla Su, she can't control the weather, which is a skill Amalla is seen capable of through playing her flute. According toAmallain the anime, Kaolla turns into her adult form because a part of her wants to grow up and return home to her step-brother. She also explains that transforming into adult form causes enormous pressure on Kaolla's body and endeavors to stop the transformations when they happen.In the manga, however, Kaolla instead explains that it is the particles in the red moonlight that reacts to her skin and makes her look more mature. The transformation is also considered a natural ability of Kaolla's and does not seem to posses any harmful side-effects.

characters.name: Akiko Taichi
characters.description: Akiko TaichiCharacter InformationOccupationStudentAffiliationsShinobu's High SchoolBackground InformationAnime"#2: The Hinata’s New Resident Shinobu: Arrow Signs"Voice ActorMari DevonSeiyūMegumi Hayashibara Akiko Taichiis a Japanese high school junior (Grade 7) who only appears in theLove Hina anime series. Friendly, optimistic and somewhat trusting, Akiko becameShinobu Maehara's first school friend after the latter managed to gather enough courage to socialize with her classmates due toKeitaro Urashima's influence.

characters.name: Amalla Su
characters.description: Amalla SuKanjiアマラ・スゥRomajiAmara SūCharacter InformationAge25ResidenceKingdom of MolmolRelativesKaolla Su(sister)OccupationCrown PrincessAffiliationsKingdom of MolmolBackground InformationAnime#10: Who is the Beautiful Woman Wandering in the Moonlight?: TransformationVoice ActorWendee LeeSeiyūAya Hisakawa Amalla Su(アマラ・スゥAmara Sū) isKaolla Su's elder sister and the other princess of theKingdom of Molmol. When questioned, Amalla claims to be from a desert near Tokyo, despite Tokyo being nowhere near any deserts. Amalla has a pet albino alligator named "Shiro", and also has a magical flute capable of changing the weather.

characters.name: Beauty and Blade
characters.description: Beauty and Bladeis the name of the Junior High and Highschool musical duo ofShinobu MaeharaandMotoko Aoyama. WithMitsune Konnoas their manager, the pair acted as stand-ins whileNaru Narusegawawent awol from her career as a pop star. Their career is short-lived, however, after Naru's violent tendencies are revealed and Mitsune is discovered to be stealing money.

characters.name: Beauty and Blade
characters.description: Beauty and Bladeis the name of the Junior High and Highschool musical duo ofShinobu MaeharaandMotoko Aoyama. characters.name: Cicada
characters.description: TheCicadais associated with the summer season in Japan. Since the cicada emerges from the ground to sing every summer, in Japan it is seen as a symbol of reincarnation and new beginnings. Of special importance is the fact that the cicada moults, leaving behind an empty shell. Furthermore, since the cicada only lives for the short period of time, long enough to attract a mate with its song and complete the process of fertilization, they are seen as a symbol of evanescence.

characters.name: Ema Maeda
characters.description: Ema MaedaKanji真枝 絵馬RomajiMaeda EmaCharacter InformationAge15 (Chapter 21)Birth DateJanuary 5th, 1990Blood TypeABResidenceHinata HouseRelativesLeon(pet)LikesConspiracy theoriesBackground InformationMangaEpilogue I. When the Cherry Blossoms BloomSeiyūSuzuki Masami (PS2)Misato Fukuen (Drama CD) Ema Maeda(真枝 絵馬Maeda Ema) is a timid 15 year old girl who has a knack for conspiracies and hopes to be accepted intoTokyo Universityone day to improve her life. For this reason she sought out theHinata Housefor its legend of providing those who reside within it the ability to pass the university’s entrance exams. Never having had a boyfriend, she lacks in self-confidence due to her skinny build, being “flat as a board”, possessing freckles and being short sighted to the point of needing glasses. Despite this, she is determined to make something of herself and sees attending Tokyo University as her salvation.

characters.name: Emi Ichikawa
characters.description: Emi Ichikawa(市川 えみ, Ichikawa Emi),Sachiyo MatsumotoandKikuko Onoueare a group of highschool juniors who look up toMotoko Aoyamaand worship her as a role model due to her stoic nature and disdain towards boys. Only appearing in the anime and OAVs, the trio of fangirls devotedly follow Motoko whenever possible, much to Motoko's irritance. However, Motoko eventually learns to appreciate their attention, particularly duringChristmaswhen she realises how lonely her life had become.The shortest of the three in height, Emi has her brown hair tied into twin-bun ponytails. She is voiced by HOKIMOTO Yuki

characters.name: Four Eyed Freak Fest
characters.description: TheFour Eyed Freakfestis a nickname thatNaru Narusegawagave to the trio ofKeitaro Urashima,Masayuki HaitaniandKimiaki Shirai(as they all wore glasses) when they boarded together at the beach during summer vacation.

characters.name: Gidget
characters.description: Gidgetis an elder femaleHot Springs Turtlethat is thought to have originated fromPararakelse Island. As the pet ofNyamo Namo, Gidget follows Nyamo during her adventures and acts as Nyamo's "pack animal" during excavations andarchaeologicaldigs.

characters.name: Godzilla
characters.description: Godzilla(ゴジラ,Gojira) is a Japanese movie monster (a daikaijū), first appearing in Ishirō Honda's 1954 filmGodzilla. Since then, Godzilla has gone on to become a worldwide pop culture icon starring in 28 films produced by Toho Co., Ltd. The monster has appeared in numerous other media incarnations including video games, novels, comic books, television series, and American remakes. With the bombings of Hiroshima and Nagasaki still fresh in the Japanese consciousness, Godzilla was conceived as a monster created by nuclear detonations and a metaphor for nuclear weapons and the Second World War in general. As the film series expanded, the stories took on less serious undertones portraying Godzilla in the role of a hero, while later movies returned to depicting the character as a destructive monster.

characters.name: Godzilla

Since then, Godzilla has gone on to become a worldwide pop culture icon starring in 28 films produced by Toho Co., Ltd. The monster has appeared in numerous other media incarnations including video games, novels, comic books, television series, and American remakes. With the bombings of Hiroshima and Nagasaki still fresh in the Japanese consciousness, Godzilla was conceived as a monster created by nuclear detonations and a metaphor for nuclear weapons and the Second World War in general. As the film series expanded, the stories took on less serious undertones portraying Godzilla in the role of a hero, while later movies returned to depicting the character as a destructive monster.

characters.name: Harem Protection Agency
characters.description: TheHarem Protection Agencyis the name given byMitsune Konnoto the protest group formed by the Hinata apartment girls to protest the destruction of the dormitory. Led by Mitsune, the group is announced as a “bunch of worthless slackers” who conducted their protest in the institute’s hotsprings, donned in swimwear while eating food and drinking alcohol.While the girls initially managed to distract the construction workers,Kanako Urashimamanaged to kick them off of the property in order to continue the building renovations.

characters.name: Hayate
characters.description: Hayateis a purple feathered (red in the anime) crane and pet toTsuruko Aoyama. Seen most often in Motoko's dream sequences and past recollections of her sister, it is unknown whether Hayate and Tsuruko's other pet crane,Shippu, have any relation.

characters.name: Hina Urashima
characters.description: Hina UrashimaKanji浦島 ひなたRomajiUrashima HinataCharacter InformationAliases"Hina", Grandma HinaAge65 (Chapter 1)Birth Date1934RelativesKeisuke Urashima(father)Yoko Urashima(daughter)Haruka Urashima(granddaughter)Keitaro Urashima(grandson)Kanako Urashima(granddaughter)Urashima FamilyOccupationLandlordAffiliationsHinata HouseBackground InformationAnime#1: All-girls Dorm with Outdoor Bath: Hot SpringSeiyūMasako Nozawa Hinata “Hina” Urashima(浦島 ひなたUrashima Hinata), also known asGrandma Hina, was the grandmother ofHaruka,Kanako, andKeitaro Urashima. She was originally the landlord and manager of theHinata Innand passed the inheritance to Keitaro. In the Manga, Grandma Hina knew all along thatNaruwas thePromise Girlthat Keitaro promised to go toTokyo Uwith. She also knew the location of the Liddo-Kun shaped time capsule Keitaro, Naru, andMutsumiburied beneath the sandbox when they were children.

characters.name: Hinata Elders
characters.description: TheHinata Eldersare a group of elder gentlemen who spend their time wandering the streets ofHinata, observing the lives and events of the town. Appearing only in the anime, the elders make various appearances throughout the episodes, commenting on the actions of various characters and remarking about the nature of following one's dreams.

characters.name: Hinata Elders
characters.description: TheHinata Eldersare a group of elder gentlemen who spend their time wandering the streets ofHinata, observing the lives and events of the town. Appearing only in the anime, the elders make various appearances throughout the episodes, commenting on the actions of various characters and remarking about the nature of following one's dreams.

characters.name: Hinata House Liberation Front
characters.description: TheHinata House Liberation Frontis a rebellion group formed byMitsune Konno,Motoko Aoyama,Kaolla Su,Shinobu MaeharaandSarah McDougalagainstKanako Urashimaand her plans of turning Hinata House into Hinata Inn. The group was formed after Kanako attempted to purge the girls' feelings for her brother,Keitaro Urashima. Instead of complying, the girls rebelled and chased Kanako out of Hinata House.Kanako, withNaru NarusegawaandMutsumi Otohimein tow, formed a counter-attack; believing that Mitsune was thePromise Girlthat Keitaro had suffered so much to meet again. Attempting to destroy the entire establishment, Kanako's plan was thwarted by the timely arrival/crash ofSeta's Van; driven by Keitaro.

characters.name: Hinata House Liberation Front
characters.description: TheHinata House Liberation Frontis a rebellion group formed byMitsune Konno,Motoko Aoyama,Kaolla Su,Shinobu MaeharaandSarah McDougalagainstKanako Urashimaand her plans of turning Hinata House into Hinata Inn. Instead of complying, the girls rebelled and chased Kanako out of Hinata House.Kanako, withNaru NarusegawaandMutsumi Otohimein tow, formed a counter-attack; believing that Mitsune was thePromise Girlthat Keitaro had suffered so much to meet again. Attempting to destroy the entire establishment, Kanako's plan was thwarted by the timely arrival/crash ofSeta's Van; driven by Keitaro.

characters.name: Julia McDougal
characters.description: Julia McDougalis the biological mother ofSarah McDougaland the companion ofHaruka UrashimaandNoriyasu Setaduring their past archaeological adventures. First meeting Haruka and Seta while attendingTokyo University, the trio quickly formed a bond and took up working as excavation assistants forNyamo Namo's grandfather; traveling across the globe and becoming embroiled in various adventures. After a while, the three become involved in a love triangle; with both Julia and Haruka vying for Seta's attention.While initially ignorant of their interest, Seta makes a promise that, by the time he was thirty, he would make up his mind and choose one of them as his love, however, Julia passed away soon after due to an unknown event.The relationship between Haruka and Seta deteriorated soon after and Haruka returned to work at theHinata Innwhile Seta continued his excavation adventures.

characters.name: Kanako Urashima
characters.description: Kanako UrashimaMangaOVAKanji浦島 可奈子RomajiUrashima KanakoCharacter InformationAliases"Keitaro's Sister"Age17 (Chapter 95)22 (Chapter 123)Birth DateAugust 1st, 1983Zodiac SignLeoBlood TypeBResidenceHinata Inn(Room 204)Hinata CaféRelativesKeitaro Urashima(step brother)Haruka Urashima(step cousin)Hina Urashima(step grandmother)Urashima FamilyKuro(pet)OccupationInn HostessUniversity StudentAffiliationsHinata ApartmentsLikesKeitaroDislikesSweet foodBackground InformationMangaHINATA 088. The Gift of a MomentAnimeLove Hina AgainVoice ActorMelissa FahnLeah ClarkSeiyūNatsuko Kuwatani Kanako Urashima(浦島 可奈子,Urashima Kanako) is Keitaro's younger step-sister, while Keitaro was studying abroad, Kanako was sent byHina Urashimato act as temporary manager of theHinata Apartments. Her black cat,Kuro, accompanies her wherever she goes. Kanako prefers to conduct herself professionally in whatever she does; as such she maintains a strict/serious air about her that often alienates the more relaxed tenants of the Hinata dorms.

characters.description: Kaolla SuMangaAnimeOVADreamcastPlaystationKanjiカオラ・スゥRomajiKaora SūCharacter InformationAliasesPrincess of MolmolAge13 (Chapter 1)16 (Chapter 89)20 (Chapter 123)Birth DateJanuary 11, 1985Zodiac SignCapricornBlood TypeOResidenceHinata Inn(Room 301)RelativesLamba Lu(step brother)Amalla Su(sister)OccupationStudentCrown PrincessAffiliationsKingdom of MolmolHinata RestaurantLikesBananasTamaInventingEatingDislikesWhen Motoko is awayBeing hungryBackground InformationMangaHINATA 001. Welcome to Hinata HouseAnime"#1: All-girls Dorm with Outdoor Bath: Hot Spring"Voice ActorWendee LeeSeiyūReiko Takagi Kaolla Su(カオラ・スゥKaora Sū) is an eighth grade foreign exchange student who boards at theHinata House. She goes to the same school asShinobu Maehara. Liking to keep her origins a secret, it was initially thought that she was from India, or possibly even Australia. However, it was later revealed that she was actually a royal princess from theKingdom of Molmol, an island nation in the Pacific.

characters.name: Kaolla's Bodyguards
characters.description: Kaolla's Bodyguardsare a group of minor characters who work as assistants and bodyguards to the royal princess of theKingdom of Molmol;Kaolla Su. Dressed in black business suits, all of the guards are women of Molmol ethnicity, with the seeming exception of their leader; a woman with black, braided hair. Possessing high rank in the Molmol military and considerable skill in combat, members of the group run the airshipAmallan Kaollanwhile Kaolla resided within it and further assisted in the wedding ofNoriyasu SetaandHaruka Urashimaat theTodai Ruins.

characters.name: Keisuke Urashima
characters.description: Keisuke,HinaandMoe Keisuke Urashima(b. 1917) was the father of Hina Urashima (b. 1934) and great-grandfather ofKeitaro Urashima(b. 1979).  While only appearing in the animated adaptation ofLove Hina, he was presumably landlord ofHinata Innfor a time. During the beginning of the Second World War, Keisuke bought a French doll from theImperial University of Tokyoin the hopes of returning it to working condition. Naming it Moe after the production tag on its neck, he kept the doll in one of the underground rooms of the inn. He unfortunately shared hisdescendant'spoor memory; despite using journals to help remember events, Keisuke's promise to fixMoewouldn’t be fulfilled until nearly three decades later, when she is rediscovered by the similar-looking Keitaro.

He unfortunately shared hisdescendant'spoor memory; despite using journals to help remember events, Keisuke's promise to fixMoewouldn’t be fulfilled until nearly three decades later, when she is rediscovered by the similar-looking Keitaro.

characters.name: Ken Akamatsu (Anime)
characters.description: Ken Akamatsuis a famed mangaka, famous for the creation of the manga and anime seriesA.I. Love You. Head ofStudio Akamatsu, Akamatsu continues to create and sell manga at various exhibitions and once attempted to embark on a world-wide boat tour with his two assistants, Magii and Betty, only for the ship to be shanghaied byMotoko,Kitsune, andMutsumi.

characters.name: Ken Akamatsu (Anime)
characters.description: Ken Akamatsuis a famed mangaka, famous for the creation of the manga and anime seriesA.I. Love You. Head ofStudio Akamatsu, Akamatsu continues to create and sell manga at various exhibitions and once attempted to embark on a world-wide boat tour with his two assistants, Magii and Betty, only for the ship to be shanghaied byMotoko,Kitsune, andMutsumi.

characters.name: Kentaro Sakata
characters.description: Kentaro SakataKanji坂田 健太朗RomajiSakata KentarōCharacter InformationAliases“Keitaro” SakataAge18Birth Date1981ResidenceHinataRelativesUnnamed FatherOccupationHigh School GraduateAffiliationsKyoto UniversityLikesNaru NarusegawaDislikesAmalla Su,Kaolla SuBackground InformationAnime#7: First Date, Keitaro’s True Feelings: NowadaysVoice ActorSteve ArenoSeiyūRyotaro Okiayu Kentaro Sakata(坂田 健太朗 Sakata Kentarō) is a rich, handsome, genre savvy high-school graduate who acted as Keitaro’s one time rival for Naru’s affections. Only appearing in the anime series, he acts as a pragmatic foil to Keitaro’s romantic idealism. Astute, professionally well-mannered and intelligent, Kentaro grew up in a well-off family in Japan. Extremely competent in comparison to Keitaro, Kentaro was accepted atK Universityfollowing his graduation.While not one to outright abhor hard work when it comes to business, he is essentially a playboy in affairs of love and goes about such affairs without feeling it necessary to involve such romantic ideals as “true love” and “open hearted honesty”.

Only appearing in the anime series, he acts as a pragmatic foil to Keitaro’s romantic idealism. Astute, professionally well-mannered and intelligent, Kentaro grew up in a well-off family in Japan. Extremely competent in comparison to Keitaro, Kentaro was accepted atK Universityfollowing his graduation.While not one to outright abhor hard work when it comes to business, he is essentially a playboy in affairs of love and goes about such affairs without feeling it necessary to involve such romantic ideals as “true love” and “open hearted honesty”.

characters.name: Kikuko Onoue
characters.description: Kikuko Onoue(尾上 菊子, Onoue Kikuko),Sachiyo MatsumotoandEmi Ichikawaare a group of highschool juniors who look up toMotoko Aoyamaand worship her as a role model due to her stoic nature and disdain towards boys. Only appearing in the anime and OAVs, the trio of fangirls devotedly follow Motoko whenever possible, much to Motoko's irritance. However, Motoko eventually learns to appreciate their attention, particularly duringChristmaswhen she realises how lonely her life had become.The tallest of the three girls, Kikuko once became possessed by a murderous spirit who despised and killed men.
